_about: The ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) for each service area, in one place. Drives BOTH sourcing (which keywords to search) AND scoring (how well a company fits). Values below reflect the confirmed initial ICP from the team (2026-07): Korean SMEs & mid-market tech/IT companies with acute developer/IT talent shortages.
_priority: IT servicing + manpower placement (per the team). AI / SI kept for completeness but not the current focus.

_confirmed_icp.firm_size_employees: 20-300 (segment under the most acute hiring pressure)
_confirmed_icp.industries: tech-enabled: SaaS, fintech, gaming, e-commerce platforms, IT services / system integrators (NOT heavy manufacturing or chaebol-adjacent)
_confirmed_icp.roles_needed: mid-level dev / QA / DevOps / customer support (CX) / back-office ops — expensive or slow to fill domestically, no Korea-specific licensing
_confirmed_icp.buying_trigger: actively hiring but blocked by cost/time-to-fill; e.g. roles open 60+ days on Korean job boards, or public hiring-headwind statements
_confirmed_icp.decision_maker: Founder/COO (smaller); Head of HR or Head of Engineering (100-300) — not CHRO or procurement
_confirmed_icp.warm_lead_layer: companies already outsourcing offshore (Vietnam/Cambodia) — primed to compare the Philippines

_fit_formula: fit = 100 * (w.signal*signal_fit + w.intent*intent + w.region*region_fit). signal_fit = 1.0 if the company's industry is in target_industries OR a signal_term appears in its job titles/tech, else 0.3. intent = min(1, hiring_count/5). region_fit = 1.0 if a target_region matches, else 0.5.

ai_implementation.label: AI Implementation (not current priority)
ai_implementation._note: target_industries intentionally empty — AI-Implementation fit is driven by actual AI signals (AI/ML in postings/tech), not by being a software company.
